project.name: From Discussion to Action — Our Claude Playbook

decisions.text: Confirm the four seats and everyone installs the Claude desktop app
Agree the privacy protocol — desktop, local, minimise & redact
Shortlist 3–5 Phase 1 operations to improve efficiency
Assign an owner and a target date to each
Set the date for our first review check-in

phases.name: Phase 1
phases.label: Efficiency
phases.description: Cut time cost and raise quality — accuracy and completeness — across all existing delivery work.

phases.name: Phase 2
phases.label: Data Visualisation
phases.description: Dashboards and exception reports so management can see WIP, deadlines and capacity at a glance.

phases.name: Phase 3
phases.label: Client Acquisition
phases.description: Lead generation, conversion and CRM — fill new capacity with higher-value work.

operations.name: Review proforma FS before Partner review
operations.notes: Use hk-audit-review skill to catch errors in proforma FS before submission to Adonis. First pilot recommended.
operations.conditions: Requires: FS in PDF/Word format; client name redacted; Adonis reviews all output before sign-off.

operations.name: Cross-check tax notes / report / balance sheet for consistency
operations.notes: Claude cross-references tax notes, auditor's report and balance sheet for numerical and disclosure consistency.
operations.conditions: Requires: complete draft FS set; identifiers redacted where possible.

operations.name: Draft audit completion memo (Section B)
operations.notes: Use audit-completion-memo skill to produce Section B ACM for Adonis review.
operations.conditions: Requires: proforma FS, profits tax computation, lead schedules uploaded. Trigger with keyword 'Section B'.

operations.name: Generate Xero year-end manual journal CSV
operations.notes: Use xero-yearend-journal skill to produce importable CSV from TB movement. UTF-8 BOM, DD/MM/YYYY format.
operations.conditions: Requires: prior year Xero TB export + current year financials + Xero journal template.

operations.name: AP4.1 — better staff input UI; AI fills the program's spreadsheets
operations.notes: Build a clean HTML input form for audit staff; Claude Code populates AP4.1 spreadsheets via openpyxl. Replaces manual data entry across multiple sheets.
operations.conditions: Requires: mapping of all AP4.1 spreadsheet fields; confirmation of file format (xlsx); pilot on one engagement first.

operations.name: Prepare employer's returns (BIR56A / 56B)
operations.notes: Claude drafts BIR56A/56B from payroll data; staff verify against HR records before submission.
operations.conditions: Requires: payroll data in structured format; personal data minimised.

operations.name: Draft bilingual client emails & WhatsApp messages
operations.notes: Claude drafts formal English emails and Cantonese WhatsApp messages. Staff review tone and accuracy before sending.
operations.conditions: No client confidential data in the draft prompt; use generalised scenario with specifics added by staff post-draft.

operations.name: Draft minutes, resolutions & statutory forms
operations.notes: Claude drafts board minutes, written resolutions and statutory forms (e.g. NNC1, ND2A). CDD verification remains manual.
operations.conditions: Requires: meeting agenda or resolution details; CDD verification by staff against independent sources; no STR matters.
